data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pre-arrival and post-departure inspection signatures.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pre-arrival and post-departure inspection signatures' but did not provide any concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate these requirements are being met. The linked use case outlines various signature needs, but there is no specific evidence confirming that the requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming pre-arrival and post-departure inspection signatures are satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
